name: Buddy
description: Monitor Buddy CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Buddy at https://app.buddy.works (US) or https://eu.buddy.works (EU)
2. Go to Profile > Personal Access Tokens
3. Generate a new token with workspace and pipeline scopes
4. Set the API Endpoint URL based on your region:
   - US accounts: https://api.buddy.works
   - EU accounts: https://api.eu.buddy.works
   - Self-hosted: https://YOUR-IP/api
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Buddy Profile > Personal Access Tokens. Generate a token with workspace and pipeline scopes.

credentialFields.label: API Endpoint URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Buddy API endpoint. US accounts: https://api.buddy.works, EU accounts: https://api.eu.buddy.works, Self-hosted: https://YOUR-IP/api

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Buddy CI/CD pipelines are configured to automate code deployments

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Buddy account is active with authorized team members
